buildCommand: cd client && npm install && npx vite build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://api.fontshare.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://api.fontshare.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://pypi.org https://files.pythonhosted.org wss://*.supabase.co blob:; img-src 'self' blob: data: https://*.githubusercontent.com; worker-src 'self' blob:; frame-src 'none'
